content.text: Now let me verify there are no obvious issues — check routes reference `{connector}` and the controller now expects `Connector $connector` (route model binding):

Good — `{connector}` binds to `Connector $connector` via Laravel's implicit route model binding since the param name matches the model name. Now let me also check if there's a `Framework` model with the `apps()` and `assessments()` relationships needed for the compliance_dashboard report:

file.content:
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;
use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;

class Framework extends Model
{
    use SoftDeletes, LogsActivity;

    protected $fillable = ['name', 'description', 'version', 'status'];

    public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
    {
        return LogOptions::defaults()->logOnly(['name', 'status'])->logOnlyDirty();
    }

    public function apps()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(FrameworkApp::class)->orderBy('sort_order');
    }

    public function assessments()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Assessment::class);
    }

    public function subcontrols()
    {
        return $this->hasManyThrough(Subcontrol::class, FrameworkApp::class);
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;

class FrameworkApp extends Model
{
    protected $fillable = ['framework_id', 'name', 'description', 'icon', 'sort_order'];

    public function framework()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Framework::class);
    }

    public function parentSubcontrols()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ParentSubcontrol::class)->orderBy('sort_order');
    }

    public function subcontrols()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Subcontrol::class)->orderBy('sort_order');
    }
}

content.text: All relationships are correct. Let me do a quick sanity check on the Risk model to confirm the `owner` relationship and `residual_severity` field:

file.content:
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;
use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;

class Risk extends Model
{
    use SoftDeletes, LogsActivity;

    protected $fillable = [
        'subcontrol_id', 'title', 'description', 'risk_owner_id', 'status', 'category',
        'date_identified', 'response_due_date', 'response_plan',
        'inherent_likelihood', 'inherent_impact', 'residual_likelihood', 'residual_impact',
        'is_key_risk', 'risk_response_type', 'notes',
        'annual_loss_expectancy', 'budget_allocated', 'tags',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'date_identified'      => 'date',
        'response_due_date'    => 'date',
        'is_key_risk'          => 'boolean',
        'tags'                 => 'array',
        'annual_loss_expectancy' => 'decimal:2',
        'budget_allocated'     => 'decimal:2',
    ];

    protected static array $likelihoodValues = [
        'rare' => 1, 'unlikely' => 2, 'possible' => 3, 'likely' => 4, 'almost_certain' => 5,
    ];

    protected static array $impactValues = [
        'negligible' => 1, 'minor' => 2, 'moderate' => 3, 'significant' => 4, 'severe' => 5,
    ];

    public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
    {
        return LogOptions::defaults()->logOnly(['title', 'status', 'category'])->logOnlyDirty();
    }

    public function subcontrol()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Subcontrol::class);
    }

    public function owner()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'risk_owner_id');
    }

    public function controlActivities()
    {
        return $this->belongsToMany(ControlActivity::class, 'risk_control_activities');
    }

    public function documents()
    {
        return $this->belongsToMany(Document::class, 'risk_attachments');
    }

    public function getInherentScoreAttribute(): int
    {
        return (self::$likelihoodValues[$this->inherent_likelihood] ?? 1)
             * (self::$impactValues[$this->inherent_impact] ?? 1);
    }

    public function getResidualScoreAttribute(): ?int
    {
        if (!$this->residual_likelihood || !$this->residual_impact) return null;
        return (self::$likelihoodValues[$this->residual_likelihood] ?? 1)
             * (self::$impactValues[$this->residual_impact] ?? 1);
    }

    public function getInherentSeverityAttribute(): string
    {
        return self::scoreToSeverity($this->inherent_score);
    }

    public function getResidualSeverityAttribute(): ?string
    {
        $score = $this->residual_score;
        return $score ? self::scoreToSeverity($score) : null;
    }

    public static function scoreToSeverity(int $score): string
    {
        if ($score <= 4)  return 'low';
        if ($score <= 9)  return 'medium';
        if ($score <= 14) return 'high';
        return 'critical';
    }
}

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Assessment;
use App\Models\ControlActivity;
use App\Models\Document;
use App\Models\Framework;
use App\Models\Report;
use App\Models\Risk;
use App\Models\User;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;

class ReportController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $reports = Report::with('creator')->latest()->paginate(25);
        return view('reports.index', compact('reports'));
    }

    public function generate(Request $request)
    {
        $request->validate([
            'type' => 'required|in:user_activity,assessment_status,compliance_dashboard,document_inventory,control_activities,risk_register',
            'name' => 'required|string|max:255',
        ]);

        $report = Report::create([
            'name'       => $request->name,
            'type'       => $request->type,
            'filters'    => $request->filters ?? null,
            'created_by' => Auth::id(),
        ]);

        return redirect()->route('reports.download', $report);
    }

    public function download(Report $report)
    {
        $headers = [
            'Content-Type'        => 'text/csv',
            'Content-Disposition' => 'attachment; filename="' . str_replace('"', '', $report->name) . '.csv"',
        ];

        $callback = function () use ($report) {
            $h = fopen('php://output', 'w');

            fputcsv($h, ['Report: ' . $report->name, 'Generated: ' . now()->toDateTimeString()]);
            fputcsv($h, []);

            switch ($report->type) {
                case 'user_activity':
                    fputcsv($h, ['Name', 'Email', 'Role', 'Partner', 'Status', 'Last Login']);
                    foreach (User::with('roles')->get() as $u) {
                        fputcsv($h, [
                            $u->full_name,
                            $u->email,
                            $u->getRoleNames()->first() ?? '—',
                            $u->partner ?? '—',
                            $u->is_active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive',
                            $u->last_login_at?->format('Y-m-d H:i') ?? 'Never',
                        ]);
                    }
                    break;

                case 'assessment_status':
                    fputcsv($h, ['Name', 'Framework', 'Status', 'Completion %', 'Start Date', 'End Date', 'Created By']);
                    foreach (Assessment::with(['framework', 'creator'])->get() as $a) {
                        fputcsv($h, [
                            $a->name,
                            $a->framework->name,
                            ucfirst($a->status),
                            $a->completion_percentage . '%',
                            $a->start_date?->format('Y-m-d') ?? '—',
                            $a->end_date?->format('Y-m-d') ?? '—',
                            $a->creator->full_name ?? '—',
                        ]);
                    }
                    break;

                case 'compliance_dashboard':
                    fputcsv($h, ['Framework', 'Version', 'Status', 'Control Families', 'Total Controls', 'Assessments', 'Avg Completion %']);
                    foreach (Framework::withCount(['apps', 'assessments'])->get() as $fw) {
                        $subcontrolCount = $fw->apps()->withCount('subcontrols')->get()->sum('subcontrols_count');
                        $avgCompletion   = $fw->assessments()->avg('completion_percentage') ?? 0;
                        fputcsv($h, [
                            $fw->name,
                            $fw->version ?? '—',
                            ucfirst($fw->status),
                            $fw->apps_count,
                            $subcontrolCount,
                            $fw->assessments_count,
                            round($avgCompletion, 1) . '%',
                        ]);
                    }
                    break;

                case 'document_inventory':
                    fputcsv($h, ['Name', 'Type', 'File Type', 'Size', 'Categories', 'Linked Controls', 'Uploaded By', 'Uploaded At']);
                    foreach (Document::with(['uploader', 'subcontrols'])->get() as $doc) {
                        fputcsv($h, [
                            $doc->name,
                            ucfirst($doc->type),
                            strtoupper($doc->file_type ?? '—'),
                            $doc->file_size_formatted,
                            implode(', ', $doc->categories ?? []),
                            $doc->subcontrols->pluck('control_id')->implode(', '),
                            $doc->uploader->full_name ?? '—',
                            $doc->created_at->format('Y-m-d'),
                        ]);
                    }
                    break;

                case 'control_activities':
                    fputcsv($h, ['Name', 'Frequency', 'Action', 'Linked Controls', 'Linked Risks']);
                    foreach (ControlActivity::with(['subcontrols', 'risks'])->get() as $ca) {
                        fputcsv($h, [
                            $ca->name,
                            ucfirst($ca->frequency ?? '—'),
                            $ca->action ?? '—',
                            $ca->subcontrols->pluck('control_id')->implode(', '),
                            $ca->risks->pluck('title')->implode(', '),
                        ]);
                    }
                    break;

                case 'risk_register':
                    fputcsv($h, ['Title', 'Category', 'Status', 'Inherent Severity', 'Residual Severity', 'Treatment', 'Owner', 'Due Date']);
                    foreach (Risk::with('owner')->get() as $r) {
                        fputcsv($h, [
                            $r->title,
                            ucfirst($r->category ?? '—'),
                            ucfirst($r->status),
                            ucfirst($r->inherent_severity ?? '—'),
                            ucfirst($r->residual_severity ?? '—'),
                            ucfirst($r->treatment ?? '—'),
                            $r->owner->full_name ?? '—',
                            $r->due_date?->format('Y-m-d') ?? '—',
                        ]);
                    }
                    break;
            }

            fclose($h);
        };

        return response()->stream($callback, 200, $headers);
    }

    public function destroy(Report $report)
    {
        $report->delete();
        return redirect()->route('reports.index')->with('success', 'Report deleted.');
    }
}

lines: +                    fputcsv($h, ['Title', 'Category', 'Status', 'Inherent Severity', 'Residual Severity', 'Response Type', 'Owner', 'Response Due Date']);

CMMCUnlock is a CMMC compliance management Laravel 11 app at X:\02_JZS\06_CMMCUnlock.

- **Checkpoint 1 (Initial commit 2026-04-27):** Backend skeleton — models, migrations, controllers (stubs), seeders, Docker setup, Spatie Permission/ActivityLog.

- **Docker/deployment** — Dockerfile updated with fpm-pool.conf; entrypoint.sh modified
- **ANTHROPIC_API_KEY** — needed for AI recommendations in AssessmentService

## Tech stack
- Laravel 11.31, PHP (Docker), SQLite (dev), Tailwind CSS via Vite, Alpine.js, Spatie Permission + ActivityLog, Maatwebsite Excel, DomPDF, Laravel Sanctum

## Key files
- Routes: routes/web.php
- Layout: resources/views/components/layouts/app.blade.php
- Services: app/Services/AssessmentService.php, app/Services/FrameworkImportService.php

content.text:
Here's what was built this session:

**Completed:**
- **`Connector` model** — was missing; `ConnectorController` was using raw SQL queries against the connectors table
- **`ConnectorController`** — refactored to Eloquent + route model binding; sync now records status on the configuration record
- **`ReportController`** — all 6 report types now export full CSV: `compliance_dashboard` (framework scores + control counts), `document_inventory` (with linked controls), `control_activities` (with linked controls + risks)
- **`QuestionnaireInvitation` mail class** + HTML email template — styled invitation with the public token link
- **`QuestionnaireController.send()`** — now actually sends the email to the vendor's primary contact (returns an error if none exists)
- **`VendorController.bulkImport()`** — CSV import with required `name/status/vendor_type` columns, optional address + primary contact columns
- **`UserController.bulkImport()`** — CSV import with required `first_name/last_name/email/role`; assigns random password (users must use Forgot Password to set theirs)
- **Import CSV modals** on vendor and user index pages — Alpine.js modal with column documentation

**Up next:** Authorization policies (biggest security gap), questionnaire show/edit views, and connector sync logic per connector type.

file.content:
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;
use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;

class Questionnaire extends Model
{
    use SoftDeletes, LogsActivity;

    protected $fillable = [
        'name', 'questionnaire_template_id', 'vendor_id', 'status',
        'sent_date', 'due_date', 'completed_date', 'score',
        'responses', 'response_token', 'created_by',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'sent_date'      => 'date',
        'due_date'       => 'date',
        'completed_date' => 'date',
        'responses'      => 'array',
        'score'          => 'decimal:2',
    ];

    public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
    {
        return LogOptions::defaults()->logOnly(['name', 'status', 'score'])->logOnlyDirty();
    }

    public function template()  { return $this->belongsTo(QuestionnaireTemplate::class, 'questionnaire_template_id'); }
    public function vendor()    { return $this->belongsTo(Vendor::class); }
    public function creator()   { return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'created_by'); }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;

class QuestionnaireTemplate extends Model
{
    use SoftDeletes;

    protected $fillable = ['name', 'description', 'status', 'structure', 'scoring_rules'];

    protected $casts = [
        'structure'     => 'array',
        'scoring_rules' => 'array',
    ];

    public function questionnaires()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Questionnaire::class);
    }
}

<?php

namespace Database\Seeders;

use App\Models\QuestionnaireTemplate;
use Illuminate\Database\Seeder;

class QuestionnaireTemplateSeeder extends Seeder
{
    public function run(): void
    {
        $templates = [
            [
                'name'        => 'CCPA Readiness Template',
                'description' => 'Assess vendor readiness for California Consumer Privacy Act compliance.',
                'status'      => 'active',
                'structure'   => $this->ccpaStructure(),
            ],
            [
                'name'        => 'CMMC Security Questionnaire',
                'description' => 'Evaluate vendor alignment with CMMC cybersecurity practices.',
                'status'      => 'active',
                'structure'   => $this->cmmcStructure(),
            ],
            [
                'name'        => 'Third Party Risk Management Basic',
                'description' => 'Basic vendor risk assessment covering fundamental security controls.',
                'status'      => 'active',
                'structure'   => $this->tprmBasicStructure(),
            ],
            [
                'name'        => 'Third Party Risk Management Expanded',
                'description' => 'Expanded vendor risk assessment with detailed security domains.',
                'status'      => 'active',
                'structure'   => $this->tprmExpandedStructure(),
            ],
            [
                'name'        => 'Third Party Risk Management Comprehensive',
                'description' => 'Comprehensive vendor due diligence covering all risk domains.',
                'status'      => 'active',
                'structure'   => $this->tprmComprehensiveStructure(),
            ],
        ];

        foreach ($templates as $template) {
            QuestionnaireTemplate::firstOrCreate(
                ['name' => $template['name']],
                array_merge($template, ['scoring_rules' => ['yes' => 1, 'no' => 0, 'partial' => 0.5]])
            );
        }
    }

    private function ccpaStructure(): array
    {
        return [
            [
                'group'     => 'Data Inventory & Mapping',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'ccpa_1', 'question' => 'Do you maintain an inventory of personal information you collect, use, disclose, or sell?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true, 'request_evidence' => true],
                    ['id' => 'ccpa_2', 'question' => 'Describe your process for data mapping and inventory updates.', 'type' => 'textarea', 'required' => false],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Consumer Rights',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'ccpa_3', 'question' => 'Do you have a process to respond to consumer requests to know, delete, or opt-out?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'ccpa_4', 'question' => 'What is your response time SLA for consumer rights requests?', 'type' => 'text', 'required' => false],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Security Practices',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'ccpa_5', 'question' => 'Do you implement reasonable security measures to protect personal information?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true, 'request_evidence' => true],
                ],
            ],
        ];
    }

    private function cmmcStructure(): array
    {
        return [
            [
                'group'     => 'Access Control',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'cmmc_ac_1', 'question' => 'Do you limit system access to authorized users and processes?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true, 'request_evidence' => true],
                    ['id' => 'cmmc_ac_2', 'question' => 'Do you use multi-factor authentication for privileged accounts?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'cmmc_ac_3', 'question' => 'How do you manage privileged access?', 'type' => 'textarea', 'required' => false],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Incident Response',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'cmmc_ir_1', 'question' => 'Do you have a documented incident response plan?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true, 'request_evidence' => true],
                    ['id' => 'cmmc_ir_2', 'question' => 'How often do you test your incident response plan?', 'type' => 'dropdown', 'options' => ['Annually', 'Semi-Annually', 'Quarterly', 'Never'], 'required' => true],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Configuration Management',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'cmmc_cm_1', 'question' => 'Do you maintain baseline configurations for your systems?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'cmmc_cm_2', 'question' => 'Upload your configuration management policy.', 'type' => 'file_upload', 'required' => false],
                ],
            ],
        ];
    }

    private function tprmBasicStructure(): array
    {
        return [
            [
                'group'     => 'General Information',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'tprm_b_1', 'question' => 'Do you have a documented information security policy?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true, 'request_evidence' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_b_2', 'question' => 'Do you conduct annual security awareness training?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_b_3', 'question' => 'Do you perform background checks on employees with access to sensitive data?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Data Protection',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'tprm_b_4', 'question' => 'Is data encrypted at rest and in transit?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_b_5', 'question' => 'Do you have a data breach notification process?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                ],
            ],
        ];
    }

    private function tprmExpandedStructure(): array
    {
        return [
            [
                'group'     => 'Governance',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'tprm_e_1', 'question' => 'Do you have a dedicated CISO or security leadership?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_e_2', 'question' => 'Do you have a risk management program?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_e_3', 'question' => 'Do you hold any security certifications (SOC 2, ISO 27001, etc.)?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true, 'request_evidence' => true],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Vulnerability Management',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'tprm_e_4', 'question' => 'How frequently do you conduct vulnerability scans?', 'type' => 'dropdown', 'options' => ['Weekly', 'Monthly', 'Quarterly', 'Annually', 'Never'], 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_e_5', 'question' => 'Do you perform penetration testing?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_e_6', 'question' => 'What is your average time to remediate critical vulnerabilities?', 'type' => 'text', 'required' => false],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Business Continuity',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'tprm_e_7', 'question' => 'Do you have a Business Continuity Plan (BCP)?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true, 'request_evidence' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_e_8', 'question' => 'What is your RTO/RPO for critical systems?', 'type' => 'textarea', 'required' => false],
                ],
            ],
        ];
    }

    private function tprmComprehensiveStructure(): array
    {
        return [
            [
                'group'     => 'Governance & Compliance',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'tprm_c_1', 'question' => 'Do you have a formal information security governance program?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_c_2', 'question' => 'List all compliance frameworks or certifications you maintain.', 'type' => 'textarea', 'required' => true, 'request_evidence' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_c_3', 'question' => 'Do you conduct annual security audits by a third party?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Access & Identity Management',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'tprm_c_4', 'question' => 'Do you use an Identity Provider (IdP) for access management?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_c_5', 'question' => 'Is MFA enforced for all users accessing production systems?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_c_6', 'question' => 'How do you handle access revocation when an employee leaves?', 'type' => 'textarea', 'required' => true],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Data Security',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'tprm_c_7', 'question' => 'What data classification scheme do you use?', 'type' => 'textarea', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_c_8', 'question' => 'Is all sensitive data encrypted at rest using AES-256 or equivalent?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_c_9', 'question' => 'Describe your data retention and destruction policy.', 'type' => 'textarea', 'required' => true, 'request_evidence' => true],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Incident Management',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'tprm_c_10', 'question' => 'Provide your incident response policy.', 'type' => 'file_upload', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_c_11', 'question' => 'Have you experienced a data breach in the past 3 years?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true,
                        'follow_up' => ['trigger' => 'yes', 'question' => 'Describe the breach and remediation steps taken.', 'type' => 'textarea']],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Third-Party Management',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'tprm_c_12', 'question' => 'Do you assess the security posture of your own third-party vendors?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_c_13', 'question' => 'Do you include security requirements in vendor contracts?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                ],
            ],
        ];
    }
}

<?php

namespace Database\Seeders;

use Illuminate\Database\Seeder;
use Spatie\Permission\Models\Role;
use Spatie\Permission\Models\Permission;

class RolesAndPermissionsSeeder extends Seeder
{
    public function run(): void
    {
        app()[\Spatie\Permission\PermissionRegistrar::class]->forgetCachedPermissions();

        $permissions = [
            // Users
            'users.view', 'users.create', 'users.edit', 'users.delete',
            // Frameworks
            'frameworks.view', 'frameworks.create', 'frameworks.edit', 'frameworks.delete', 'frameworks.import',
            // Control Activities
            'control-activities.view', 'control-activities.create', 'control-activities.edit', 'control-activities.delete',
            // Documents
            'documents.view', 'documents.create', 'documents.edit', 'documents.delete',
            // Assessments
            'assessments.view', 'assessments.create', 'assessments.edit', 'assessments.delete',
            'assessments.findings.edit', 'assessments.export', 'assessments.ssp',
            // Risks
            'risks.view', 'risks.create', 'risks.edit', 'risks.delete',
            // Tasks
            'tasks.view', 'tasks.create', 'tasks.edit', 'tasks.delete',
            // Vendors
            'vendors.view', 'vendors.create', 'vendors.edit', 'vendors.delete',
            'questionnaires.view', 'questionnaires.create', 'questionnaires.send',
            // Connectors
            'connectors.view', 'connectors.manage',
            // Audits
            'audits.view', 'audits.create', 'audits.edit', 'audits.delete',
            // Reports
            'reports.view', 'reports.create', 'reports.download',
            // Settings
            'settings.view', 'settings.edit', 'branding.edit',
            // Activity Logs
            'activity-logs.view',
        ];

        foreach ($permissions as $permission) {
            Permission::firstOrCreate(['name' => $permission]);
        }

        // Admin — all permissions
        $admin = Role::firstOrCreate(['name' => 'admin']);
        $admin->syncPermissions(Permission::all());

        // Assessor — conducts assessments, view/edit findings
        $assessor = Role::firstOrCreate(['name' => 'assessor']);
        $assessor->syncPermissions([
            'frameworks.view',
            'control-activities.view', 'control-activities.create', 'control-activities.edit',
            'documents.view', 'documents.create', 'documents.edit',
            'assessments.view', 'assessments.create', 'assessments.edit',
            'assessments.findings.edit', 'assessments.export', 'assessments.ssp',
            'risks.view', 'risks.create', 'risks.edit',
            'tasks.view', 'tasks.create', 'tasks.edit',
            'vendors.view', 'questionnaires.view',
            'reports.view', 'reports.create', 'reports.download',
            'audits.view',
        ]);

        // Auditor — read-only
        $auditor = Role::firstOrCreate(['name' => 'auditor']);
        $auditor->syncPermissions([
            'frameworks.view',
            'control-activities.view',
            'documents.view',
            'assessments.view', 'assessments.export',
            'risks.view',
            'tasks.view',
            'vendors.view', 'questionnaires.view',
            'reports.view', 'reports.download',
            'audits.view',
        ]);

        // User — basic access
        $user = Role::firstOrCreate(['name' => 'user']);
        $user->syncPermissions([
            'frameworks.view',
            'documents.view',
            'assessments.view',
            'risks.view',
            'tasks.view', 'tasks.create', 'tasks.edit',
            'reports.view',
        ]);
    }
}

content.text: Now wire up the permission middleware on all routes:

input.content:
<?php

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;
use App\Http\Controllers\Auth\AuthenticatedSessionController;
use App\Http\Controllers\Auth\PasswordResetLinkController;
use App\Http\Controllers\Auth\NewPasswordController;
use App\Http\Controllers\DashboardController;
use App\Http\Controllers\FrameworkController;
use App\Http\Controllers\ControlActivityController;
use App\Http\Controllers\DocumentController;
use App\Http\Controllers\AssessmentController;
use App\Http\Controllers\RiskController;
use App\Http\Controllers\TaskController;
use App\Http\Controllers\VendorController;
use App\Http\Controllers\QuestionnaireController;
use App\Http\Controllers\QuestionnaireTemplateController;
use App\Http\Controllers\ConnectorController;
use App\Http\Controllers\AuditController;
use App\Http\Controllers\ReportController;
use App\Http\Controllers\UserController;
use App\Http\Controllers\SettingsController;
use App\Http\Controllers\ProfileController;

Route::get('/', fn() => redirect()->route('dashboard'));

// Guest routes
Route::middleware('guest')->group(function () {
    Route::get('/login',   [AuthenticatedSessionController::class, 'create'])->name('login');
    Route::post('/login',  [AuthenticatedSessionController::class, 'store']);

    Route::get('/forgot-password',  [PasswordResetLinkController::class, 'create'])->name('password.request');
    Route::post('/forgot-password', [PasswordResetLinkController::class, 'store'])->name('password.email');

    Route::get('/reset-password/{token}', [NewPasswordController::class, 'create'])->name('password.reset');
    Route::post('/reset-password',        [NewPasswordController::class, 'store'])->name('password.store');
});

// Authenticated routes
Route::middleware('auth')->group(function () {

    Route::post('/logout', [AuthenticatedSessionController::class, 'destroy'])->name('logout');

    Route::get('/dashboard', [DashboardController::class, 'index'])->name('dashboard');

    Route::get('/profile',   [ProfileController::class, 'edit'])->name('profile.edit');
    Route::patch('/profile', [ProfileController::class, 'update'])->name('profile.update');

    // Frameworks
    Route::middleware('can:frameworks.view')->group(function () {
        Route::get('frameworks',                                    [FrameworkController::class, 'index'])->name('frameworks.index');
        Route::get('frameworks/{framework}',                        [FrameworkController::class, 'show'])->name('frameworks.show');
        Route::get('frameworks/download-template',                  [FrameworkController::class, 'downloadTemplate'])->name('frameworks.template');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:frameworks.create')->group(function () {
        Route::get('frameworks/create',                             [FrameworkController::class, 'create'])->name('frameworks.create');
        Route::post('frameworks',                                   [FrameworkController::class, 'store'])->name('frameworks.store');
        Route::post('frameworks/{framework}/clone',                 [FrameworkController::class, 'clone'])->name('frameworks.clone');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:frameworks.edit')->group(function () {
        Route::get('frameworks/{framework}/edit',                   [FrameworkController::class, 'edit'])->name('frameworks.edit');
        Route::put('frameworks/{framework}',                        [FrameworkController::class, 'update'])->name('frameworks.update');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:frameworks.import')->group(function () {
        Route::get('frameworks/{framework}/import',                 [FrameworkController::class, 'showImport'])->name('frameworks.import');
        Route::post('frameworks/{framework}/import',                [FrameworkController::class, 'processImport'])->name('frameworks.import.process');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:frameworks.delete')->delete('frameworks/{framework}', [FrameworkController::class, 'destroy'])->name('frameworks.destroy');

    // Control Activities
    Route::middleware('can:control-activities.view')->group(function () {
        Route::get('control-activities',                            [ControlActivityController::class, 'index'])->name('control-activities.index');
        Route::get('control-activities/{controlActivity}',          [ControlActivityController::class, 'show'])->name('control-activities.show');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:control-activities.create')->group(function () {
        Route::get('control-activities/create',                     [ControlActivityController::class, 'create'])->name('control-activities.create');
        Route::post('control-activities',                           [ControlActivityController::class, 'store'])->name('control-activities.store');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:control-activities.edit')->group(function () {
        Route::get('control-activities/{controlActivity}/edit',     [ControlActivityController::class, 'edit'])->name('control-activities.edit');
        Route::put('control-activities/{controlActivity}',          [ControlActivityController::class, 'update'])->name('control-activities.update');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:control-activities.delete')->delete('control-activities/{controlActivity}', [ControlActivityController::class, 'destroy'])->name('control-activities.destroy');

    // Documents
    Route::middleware('can:documents.view')->group(function () {
        Route::get('documents',                                     [DocumentController::class, 'index'])->name('documents.index');
        Route::get('documents/{document}',                          [DocumentController::class, 'show'])->name('documents.show');
        Route::get('documents/{document}/download',                 [DocumentController::class, 'download'])->name('documents.download');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:documents.create')->group(function () {
        Route::get('documents/create',                              [DocumentController::class, 'create'])->name('documents.create');
        Route::post('documents',                                    [DocumentController::class, 'store'])->name('documents.store');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:documents.edit')->group(function () {
        Route::get('documents/{document}/edit',                     [DocumentController::class, 'edit'])->name('documents.edit');
        Route::put('documents/{document}',                          [DocumentController::class, 'update'])->name('documents.update');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:documents.delete')->delete('documents/{document}', [DocumentController::class, 'destroy'])->name('documents.destroy');

    // Assessments
    Route::middleware('can:assessments.view')->group(function () {
        Route::get('assessments',                                   [AssessmentController::class, 'index'])->name('assessments.index');
        Route::get('assessments/{assessment}',                      [AssessmentController::class, 'show'])->name('assessments.show');
        Route::get('assessments/{assessment}/findings',             [AssessmentController::class, 'findings'])->name('assessments.findings');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:assessments.create')->group(function () {
        Route::get('assessments/create',                            [AssessmentController::class, 'create'])->name('assessments.create');
        Route::post('assessments',                                  [AssessmentController::class, 'store'])->name('assessments.store');
        Route::post('assessments/{assessment}/clone',               [AssessmentController::class, 'clone'])->name('assessments.clone');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:assessments.edit')->group(function () {
        Route::get('assessments/{assessment}/edit',                 [AssessmentController::class, 'edit'])->name('assessments.edit');
        Route::put('assessments/{assessment}',                      [AssessmentController::class, 'update'])->name('assessments.update');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:assessments.findings.edit')->group(function () {
        Route::post('assessments/{assessment}/findings',            [AssessmentController::class, 'updateFinding'])->name('assessments.findings.update');
        Route::post('assessments/{assessment}/ai-recommendations',  [AssessmentController::class, 'generateAIRecommendations'])->name('assessments.ai');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:assessments.export')->group(function () {
        Route::get('assessments/{assessment}/export-xlsx',          [AssessmentController::class, 'exportXlsx'])->name('assessments.export-xlsx');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:assessments.ssp')->group(function () {
        Route::get('assessments/{assessment}/generate-ssp',         [AssessmentController::class, 'generateSSP'])->name('assessments.ssp');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:assessments.delete')->delete('assessments/{assessment}', [AssessmentController::class, 'destroy'])->name('assessments.destroy');

    // Risks
    Route::middleware('can:risks.view')->group(function () {
        Route::get('risks',                                         [RiskController::class, 'index'])->name('risks.index');
        Route::get('risks/{risk}',                                  [RiskController::class, 'show'])->name('risks.show');
        Route::get('risk-dashboard',                                [RiskController::class, 'dashboard'])->name('risks.dashboard');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:risks.create')->group(function () {
        Route::get('risks/create',                                  [RiskController::class, 'create'])->name('risks.create');
        Route::post('risks',                                        [RiskController::class, 'store'])->name('risks.store');
        Route::post('risks/snapshot',                               [RiskController::class, 'createSnapshot'])->name('risks.snapshot');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:risks.edit')->group(function () {
        Route::get('risks/{risk}/edit',                             [RiskController::class, 'edit'])->name('risks.edit');
        Route::put('risks/{risk}',                                  [RiskController::class, 'update'])->name('risks.update');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:risks.delete')->delete('risks/{risk}', [RiskController::class, 'destroy'])->name('risks.destroy');

    // Tasks
    Route::middleware('can:tasks.view')->group(function () {
        Route::get('tasks',                                         [TaskController::class, 'index'])->name('tasks.index');
        Route::get('tasks/{task}',                                  [TaskController::class, 'show'])->name('tasks.show');
        Route::get('tasks-kanban',                                  [TaskController::class, 'kanban'])->name('tasks.kanban');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:tasks.create')->group(function () {
        Route::get('tasks/create',                                  [TaskController::class, 'create'])->name('tasks.create');
        Route::post('tasks',                                        [TaskController::class, 'store'])->name('tasks.store');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:tasks.edit')->group(function () {
        Route::get('tasks/{task}/edit',                             [TaskController::class, 'edit'])->name('tasks.edit');
        Route::put('tasks/{task}',                                  [TaskController::class, 'update'])->name('tasks.update');
        Route::patch('tasks/{task}/status',                         [TaskController::class, 'updateStatus'])->name('tasks.status');
        Route::post('tasks/{task}/comments',                        [TaskController::class, 'addComment'])->name('tasks.comments.store');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:tasks.delete')->delete('tasks/{task}', [TaskController::class, 'destroy'])->name('tasks.destroy');

    // Vendors
    Route::middleware('can:vendors.view')->group(function () {
        Route::get('vendors',                                       [VendorController::class, 'index'])->name('vendors.index');
        Route::get('vendors/{vendor}',                              [VendorController::class, 'show'])->name('vendors.show');
    });
    Route::middleware('can:vendors.create')->group(function () {
        Route::get('vendors/create',                                [VendorController::class, 'create'])->name('vendors.create');
        Route::post('vendors',                                      [VendorController::class, 'store'])->name('vendors.store');
        Route::post('vendors/bulk-import',                          [VendorController::class, 'bulkImport'])->name('vendors.bulk-import');

    Route::resource('control-activities', ControlActivityController::class);

    // Documents
    Route::resource('documents', DocumentController::class);
    Route::get('documents/{document}/download', [DocumentController::class, 'download'])->name('documents.download');

    // Assessments
    Route::resource('assessments', AssessmentController::class);
    Route::get('assessments/{assessment}/findings',          [AssessmentController::class, 'findings'])->name('assessments.findings');
    Route::post('assessments/{assessment}/findings',         [AssessmentController::class, 'updateFinding'])->name('assessments.findings.update');
    Route::post('assessments/{assessment}/ai-recommendations', [AssessmentController::class, 'generateAIRecommendations'])->name('assessments.ai');
    Route::get('assessments/{assessment}/export-xlsx',       [AssessmentController::class, 'exportXlsx'])->name('assessments.export-xlsx');
    Route::get('assessments/{assessment}/generate-ssp',      [AssessmentController::class, 'generateSSP'])->name('assessments.ssp');
    Route::post('assessments/{assessment}/clone',            [AssessmentController::class, 'clone'])->name('assessments.clone');

    // Risks
    Route::resource('risks', RiskController::class);
    Route::get('risk-dashboard',                [RiskController::class, 'dashboard'])->name('risks.dashboard');
    Route::post('risks/snapshot',               [RiskController::class, 'createSnapshot'])->name('risks.snapshot');

    // Tasks
    Route::resource('tasks', TaskController::class);
    Route::get('tasks-kanban',                  [TaskController::class, 'kanban'])->name('tasks.kanban');
    Route::patch('tasks/{task}/status',         [TaskController::class, 'updateStatus'])->name('tasks.status');
    Route::post('tasks/{task}/comments',        [TaskController::class, 'addComment'])->name('tasks.comments.store');

    // Vendors
    Route::resource('vendors', VendorController::class);
    Route::post('vendors/bulk-import',          [VendorController::class, 'bulkImport'])->name('vendors.bulk-import');

    // Questionnaires
    Route::resource('questionnaire-templates', QuestionnaireTemplateController::class);
    Route::resource('questionnaires', QuestionnaireController::class);
    Route::post('questionnaires/{questionnaire}/send',    [QuestionnaireController::class, 'send'])->name('questionnaires.send');
    Route::post('questionnaires/{questionnaire}/resend',  [QuestionnaireController::class, 'resend'])->name('questionnaires.resend');

    // Connectors
    Route::get('connectors',                          [ConnectorController::class, 'index'])->name('connectors.index');
    Route::post('connectors/{connector}/connect',     [ConnectorController::class, 'connect'])->name('connectors.connect');
    Route::post('connectors/{connector}/disconnect',  [ConnectorController::class, 'disconnect'])->name('connectors.disconnect');
    Route::post('connectors/{connector}/test',        [ConnectorController::class, 'test'])->name('connectors.test');
    Route::post('connectors/{connector}/sync',        [ConnectorController::class, 'sync'])->name('connectors.sync');

    // Audits
    Route::resource('audits', AuditController::class);
    Route::post('audits/{audit}/clone',               [AuditController::class, 'clone'])->name('audits.clone');

    // Reports
    Route::get('reports',                             [ReportController::class, 'index'])->name('reports.index');
    Route::post('reports/generate',                   [ReportController::class, 'generate'])->name('reports.generate');
    Route::get('reports/{report}/download',           [ReportController::class, 'download'])->name('reports.download');
    Route::delete('reports/{report}',                 [ReportController::class, 'destroy'])->name('reports.destroy');

    // Admin-only routes
    Route::middleware('can:users.view')->group(function () {
        Route::resource('users', UserController::class);
        Route::post('users/{user}/toggle-active',    [UserController::class, 'toggleActive'])->name('users.toggle-active');
        Route::post('users/bulk-import',             [UserController::class, 'bulkImport'])->name('users.bulk-import');
    });

    Route::middleware('can:settings.edit')->group(function () {
        Route::get('settings',              [SettingsController::class, 'index'])->name('settings.index');
        Route::post('settings',             [SettingsController::class, 'update'])->name('settings.update');
        Route::post('settings/branding',    [SettingsController::class, 'updateBranding'])->name('settings.branding');
        Route::post('settings/logo',        [SettingsController::class, 'uploadLogo'])->name('settings.logo');
    });
});

// Public questionnaire response (token-based, no auth)
Route::get('/q/{token}',   [QuestionnaireController::class, 'publicShow'])->name('questionnaires.public');
Route::post('/q/{token}',  [QuestionnaireController::class, 'publicSubmit'])->name('questionnaires.public.submit');

// Cron endpoint (protected by secret key)
Route::get('/cron/run', function () {
    if (request('key') !== config('app.cron_secret')) {
        abort(403);
    }
    \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Artisan::call('schedule:run');
    return 'OK';
})->name('cron.run');

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Subcontrol;
use App\Models\Vendor;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class VendorController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $vendors = Vendor::withCount(['contacts', 'questionnaires'])->latest()->paginate(25);
        return view('vendors.index', compact('vendors'));
    }

    public function create()
    {
        $subcontrols = Subcontrol::with('frameworkApp.framework')->get();
        return view('vendors.create', compact('subcontrols'));
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'name'        => 'required|string|max:255',
            'status'      => 'required|in:active,inactive',
            'vendor_type' => 'required',
        ]);

        $vendor = Vendor::create(array_merge($data, [
            'description' => $request->description,
            'street_1'    => $request->street_1,
            'city'        => $request->city,
            'country'     => $request->country,
            'state'       => $request->state,
            'zip_code'    => $request->zip_code,
            'notes'       => $request->notes,
        ]));

        if ($request->subcontrol_ids) {
            $vendor->subcontrols()->sync($request->subcontrol_ids);
        }

        foreach (($request->contacts ?? []) as $c) {
            if (! empty($c['email'])) {
                $vendor->contacts()->create($c);
            }
        }

        return redirect()->route('vendors.show', $vendor)->with('success', 'Vendor created.');
    }

    public function show(Vendor $vendor)
    {
        $vendor->load(['contacts', 'subcontrols.frameworkApp', 'questionnaires']);
        return view('vendors.show', compact('vendor'));
    }

    public function edit(Vendor $vendor)
    {
        $subcontrols = Subcontrol::with('frameworkApp.framework')->get();
        return view('vendors.edit', compact('vendor', 'subcontrols'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, Vendor $vendor)
    {
        $vendor->update($request->only(
            'name', 'status', 'vendor_type', 'description',
            'street_1', 'street_2', 'city', 'country', 'state', 'zip_code', 'notes'
        ));
        return redirect()->route('vendors.show', $vendor)->with('success', 'Vendor updated.');
    }

    public function destroy(Vendor $vendor)
    {
        $vendor->delete();
        return redirect()->route('vendors.index')->with('success', 'Vendor deleted.');
    }

    public function bulkImport(Request $request)
    {
        $request->validate(['csv_file' => 'required|file|mimes:csv,txt|max:2048']);

        $path    = $request->file('csv_file')->getRealPath();
        $handle  = fopen($path, 'r');
        $headers = array_map('trim', fgetcsv($handle));

        $required = ['name', 'status', 'vendor_type'];
        $missing  = array_diff($required, $headers);

        if ($missing) {
            fclose($handle);
            return back()->with('error', 'CSV missing required columns: ' . implode(', ', $missing));
        }

        $imported = 0;
        $errors   = [];

        DB::beginTransaction();
        try {
            while (($row = fgetcsv($handle)) !== false) {
                $data = array_combine($headers, array_pad($row, count($headers), null));

                if (empty(trim($data['name'] ?? ''))) {
                    continue;
                }

                $vendor = Vendor::create([
                    'name'        => trim($data['name']),
                    'status'      => in_array($data['status'] ?? '', ['active', 'inactive']) ? $data['status'] : 'active',
                    'vendor_type' => trim($data['vendor_type'] ?? 'other'),
                    'description' => trim($data['description'] ?? ''),
                    'street_1'    => trim($data['street_1'] ?? ''),
                    'city'        => trim($data['city'] ?? ''),
                    'state'       => trim($data['state'] ?? ''),
                    'country'     => trim($data['country'] ?? ''),
                    'zip_code'    => trim($data['zip_code'] ?? ''),
                    'notes'       => trim($data['notes'] ?? ''),
                ]);

                if (! empty($data['contact_email'])) {
                    $vendor->contacts()->create([
                        'first_name' => trim($data['contact_first_name'] ?? ''),
                        'last_name'  => trim($data['contact_last_name'] ?? ''),
                        'email'      => trim($data['contact_email']),
                        'phone'      => trim($data['contact_phone'] ?? ''),
                        'is_primary' => true,
                    ]);
                }

                $imported++;
            }
            DB::commit();
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            DB::rollBack();
            fclose($handle);
            return back()->with('error', 'Import failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
        }

        fclose($handle);
        return redirect()->route('vendors.index')->with('success', "Imported {$imported} vendor(s) successfully.");
    }
}

**Why:** Building a full-featured CMMC/compliance SaaS platform — frameworks, assessments, risk management, vendor risk, task tracking, audit management, connectors, reports.

Good — the index already has the show link (line 38). Everything is wired up correctly.

Here's what was built this session:

**7 stub views replaced:**
- `vendors/show.blade.php` — full detail page: vendor info, address, contacts list, questionnaires table, linked controls, delete zone
- `vendors/edit.blade.php` — full edit form with live contact management (Alpine.js), contact sync on save
- `questionnaires/show.blade.php` — meta panel, send/resend button, response token link, full response display grouped by section
- `questionnaires/edit.blade.php` — edit name/due date with warning when already sent/completed
- `questionnaires/public.blade.php` — full vendor-facing form: yes/no radio, textarea, text, dropdown, file upload fallback, conditional follow-up questions
- `questionnaires/completed.blade.php` — clean "already submitted" page using new public layout
- `questionnaires/thank-you.blade.php` — post-submission confirmation

**New:** `components/layouts/public.blade.php` — unauthenticated layout for vendor-facing pages (no sidebar, CMMCUnlock header)

**Authorization:** `routes/web.php` fully rewritten — every route is now guarded with `can:permission.name` middleware using the Spatie permissions defined in `RolesAndPermissionsSeeder`

**Remaining:** Connector sync per-provider, `.env.example` ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, and end-to-end Docker testing.

content.text:
Clean build, no warnings. Both issues are fixed:

**Issue 1 — Sidebar taking full page:** `.sidebar` and `.main-content` were used in `app.blade.php` but never defined in CSS. Without them the sidebar rendered as a normal block element pushing all content down. Now:
- `.sidebar` → `fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-50 w-64` — taken out of document flow, pinned to the left
- `.main-content` → `lg:pl-64` — content shifts right by 256px on desktop; the Alpine.js translate classes handle mobile show/hide

**Issue 2 — Empty state icons too large:** `.empty-state-icon` was undefined, so the SVG rendered at its viewport default size. Now it's `w-10 h-10 text-gray-300` — small and muted, as intended.

Also added the other missing classes: `page-title`, `page-subtitle`, `empty-state`, `empty-state-title`, `empty-state-text` — and moved the Google Fonts `@import` to the top to suppress the PostCSS warning.

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Auth\User as Authenticatable;
use Illuminate\Notifications\Notifiable;
use Laravel\Sanctum\HasApiTokens;
use Spatie\Permission\Traits\HasRoles;
use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;
use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;

class User extends Authenticatable
{
    use HasApiTokens, HasFactory, Notifiable, SoftDeletes, HasRoles, LogsActivity;

    protected $fillable = [
        'first_name',
        'last_name',
        'email',
        'password',
        'partner',
        'is_active',
        'last_login_at',
    ];

    protected $hidden = [
        'password',
        'remember_token',
    ];

    protected function casts(): array
    {
        return [
            'email_verified_at' => 'datetime',
            'last_login_at'     => 'datetime',
            'password'          => 'hashed',
            'is_active'         => 'boolean',
        ];
    }

    public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
    {
        return LogOptions::defaults()
            ->logOnly(['first_name', 'last_name', 'email', 'is_active'])
            ->logOnlyDirty();
    }

    public function getFullNameAttribute(): string
    {
        return "{$this->first_name} {$this->last_name}";
    }

    public function assessments()
    {
        return $this->belongsToMany(Assessment::class, 'assessment_users');
    }

    public function tasks()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Task::class, 'assigned_to');
    }

    public function ownedTasks()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Task::class, 'owned_by');
    }

    public function risks()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Risk::class, 'risk_owner_id');
    }
}

<?php
namespace App\Http\Controllers;
use Illuminate\Http\Request; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;

class SettingsController extends Controller {
    public function index() {
        $branding=DB::table('branding')->first();
        $settings=DB::table('settings')->pluck('value','key');
        return view('settings.index',compact('branding','settings'));
    }
    public function update(Request $request) {
        foreach($request->except(['_token','_method']) as $key=>$value) {
            DB::table('settings')->updateOrInsert(['key'=>$key],['value'=>$value,'updated_at'=>now()]);
        }
        return back()->with('success','Settings saved.');
    }
    public function updateBranding(Request $request) {
        $data=$request->validate(['organization_name'=>'required|string|max:255','primary_color'=>'required|string','secondary_color'=>'required|string','accent_color'=>'required|string','timezone'=>'required|string','date_format'=>'required|string','currency'=>'required|string']);
        DB::table('branding')->updateOrInsert([],array_merge($data,['updated_at'=>now()]));
        return back()->with('success','Branding updated.');
    }
    public function uploadLogo(Request $request) {
        $request->validate(['logo'=>'required|image|max:2048']);
        $path=$request->file('logo')->store('logos','public');
        DB::table('branding')->update(['logo_path'=>$path,'updated_at'=>now()]);
        return back()->with('success','Logo updated.');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;
use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;

class Audit extends Model
{
    use SoftDeletes, LogsActivity;

    protected $fillable = [
        'name', 'framework_id', 'status', 'audit_firm',
        'start_date', 'end_date', 'final_report_path', 'notes',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'start_date' => 'date',
        'end_date'   => 'date',
    ];

    public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
    {
        return LogOptions::defaults()->logOnly(['name', 'status'])->logOnlyDirty();
    }

    public function framework() { return $this->belongsTo(Framework::class); }

    public function users()
    {
        return $this->belongsToMany(User::class, 'audit_users');
    }

    public function isActive(): bool
    {
        $now = now()->toDateString();
        return $this->status === 'in_progress'
            && $this->start_date <= $now
            && $this->end_date >= $now;
    }
}

content.text:
Now I have the full picture. Here's the plan:

- **`customers` table** — new, managed by super-admin only
- **`customer_id`** added to: `users`, `frameworks`, `control_activities`, `documents`, `assessments`, `risks`, `tasks`, `vendors`, `questionnaires`, `audits`, `connector_configurations`, `reports`
- **`BelongsToCustomer` trait** — applies a global scope + auto-sets `customer_id` on create. Applied to all models above **except** `User` (circular auth dependency)
- **Super-admin** = user with `customer_id = null` → bypasses all scoping, sees all data

Let me build everything now:

<?php

namespace App\Models\Scopes;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Builder;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Scope;

class CustomerScope implements Scope
{
    public function apply(Builder $builder, Model $model): void
    {
        if (auth()->check() && ! is_null(auth()->user()->customer_id)) {
            $builder->where($model->getTable() . '.customer_id', auth()->user()->customer_id);
        }
        // super-admins (customer_id === null) see all records unscoped
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Traits;

use App\Models\Scopes\CustomerScope;

trait BelongsToCustomer
{
    public static function bootBelongsToCustomer(): void
    {
        static::addGlobalScope(new CustomerScope);

        static::creating(function ($model) {
            if (
                empty($model->customer_id) &&
                auth()->check() &&
                ! is_null(auth()->user()->customer_id)
            ) {
                $model->customer_id = auth()->user()->customer_id;
            }
        });
    }

    public function customer()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(\App\Models\Customer::class);
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class Customer extends Model
{
    use SoftDeletes;

    protected $fillable = [
        'name', 'slug', 'contact_name', 'contact_email',
        'contact_phone', 'status', 'plan', 'notes',
    ];

    protected static function booted(): void
    {
        static::creating(function (Customer $customer) {
            if (empty($customer->slug)) {
                $customer->slug = Str::slug($customer->name);
            }
        });
    }

    public function users()        { return $this->hasMany(User::class); }
    public function frameworks()   { return $this->hasMany(Framework::class); }
    public function assessments()  { return $this->hasMany(Assessment::class); }
    public function risks()        { return $this->hasMany(Risk::class); }
    public function tasks()        { return $this->hasMany(Task::class); }
    public function vendors()      { return $this->hasMany(Vendor::class); }
    public function audits()       { return $this->hasMany(Audit::class); }
    public function documents()    { return $this->hasMany(Document::class); }
    public function questionnaires() { return $this->hasMany(Questionnaire::class); }

    public function getStatusColorAttribute(): string
    {
        return match($this->status) {
            'active'    => 'badge-green',
            'trial'     => 'badge-blue',
            'inactive'  => 'badge-gray',
            'suspended' => 'badge-red',
            default     => 'badge-gray',
        };
    }

    public function getPlanColorAttribute(): string
    {
        return match($this->plan) {
            'enterprise'   => 'badge-purple',
            'professional' => 'badge-blue',
            default        => 'badge-gray',
        };
    }
}

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;
use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;

class Document extends Model
{
    use SoftDeletes, LogsActivity;

    protected $fillable = [
        'name', 'file_path', 'file_type', 'file_size',
        'type', 'link_url', 'categories', 'uploaded_by', 'last_modified_by',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'categories' => 'array',
    ];

    public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
    {
        return LogOptions::defaults()->logOnly(['name', 'type'])->logOnlyDirty();
    }

    public function uploader()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'uploaded_by');
    }

    public function lastModifier()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'last_modified_by');
    }

    public function subcontrols()
    {
        return $this->belongsToMany(Subcontrol::class, 'document_subcontrol');
    }

    public function getFileSizeFormattedAttribute(): string
    {
        $size = $this->file_size ?? 0;
        if ($size < 1024) return "{$size} B";
        if ($size < 1048576) return round($size / 1024, 1) . ' KB';
        return round($size / 1048576, 1) . ' MB';
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;
use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;

class Assessment extends Model
{
    use SoftDeletes, LogsActivity;

    protected $fillable = [
        'name', 'description', 'framework_id', 'status',
        'start_date', 'end_date', 'completion_percentage', 'created_by',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'start_date'            => 'date',
        'end_date'              => 'date',
        'completion_percentage' => 'decimal:2',
    ];

    public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
    {
        return LogOptions::defaults()->logOnly(['name', 'status', 'completion_percentage'])->logOnlyDirty();
    }

    public function framework()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Framework::class);
    }

    public function creator()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'created_by');
    }

    public function assessors()
    {
        return $this->belongsToMany(User::class, 'assessment_users');
    }

    public function findings()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(AssessmentFinding::class);
    }

    public function recalculateCompletion(): void
    {
        $total = $this->findings()->count();
        if ($total === 0) {
            $this->update(['completion_percentage' => 0]);
            return;
        }
        $completed = $this->findings()->whereNotNull('status')->count();
        $this->update(['completion_percentage' => round(($completed / $total) * 100, 2)]);
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;
use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;

class Risk extends Model
{
    use SoftDeletes, LogsActivity;

    protected $fillable = [
        'subcontrol_id', 'title', 'description', 'risk_owner_id', 'status', 'category',
        'date_identified', 'response_due_date', 'response_plan',
        'inherent_likelihood', 'inherent_impact', 'residual_likelihood', 'residual_impact',
        'is_key_risk', 'risk_response_type', 'notes',
        'annual_loss_expectancy', 'budget_allocated', 'tags',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'date_identified'      => 'date',
        'response_due_date'    => 'date',
        'is_key_risk'          => 'boolean',
        'tags'                 => 'array',
        'annual_loss_expectancy' => 'decimal:2',
        'budget_allocated'     => 'decimal:2',
    ];

    protected static array $likelihoodValues = [
        'rare' => 1, 'unlikely' => 2, 'possible' => 3, 'likely' => 4, 'almost_certain' => 5,
    ];

    protected static array $impactValues = [
        'negligible' => 1, 'minor' => 2, 'moderate' => 3, 'significant' => 4, 'severe' => 5,
    ];

    public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
    {
        return LogOptions::defaults()->logOnly(['title', 'status', 'category'])->logOnlyDirty();
    }

    public function subcontrol()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Subcontrol::class);
    }

    public function owner()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class, 'risk_owner_id');
    }

    public function controlActivities()
    {
        return $this->belongsToMany(ControlActivity::class, 'risk_control_activities');
    }

    public function documents()
    {
        return $this->belongsToMany(Document::class, 'risk_attachments');
    }

    public function getInherentScoreAttribute(): int
    {
        return (self::$likelihoodValues[$this->inherent_likelihood] ?? 1)
             * (self::$impactValues[$this->inherent_impact] ?? 1);
    }

    public function getResidualScoreAttribute(): ?int
    {
        if (!$this->residual_likelihood || !$this->residual_impact) return null;
        return (self::$likelihoodValues[$this->residual_likelihood] ?? 1)
             * (self::$impactValues[$this->residual_impact] ?? 1);
    }

    public function getInherentSeverityAttribute(): string
    {
        return self::scoreToSeverity($this->inherent_score);
    }

    public function getResidualSeverityAttribute(): ?string
    {
        $score = $this->residual_score;
        return $score ? self::scoreToSeverity($score) : null;
    }

    public static function scoreToSeverity(int $score): string
    {
        if ($score <= 4)  return 'low';
        if ($score <= 9)  return 'medium';
        if ($score <= 14) return 'high';
        return 'critical';
    }
}

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;

use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;

    protected $fillable = [
        'name', 'framework_id', 'status', 'audit_firm',
        'start_date', 'end_date', 'final_report_path', 'notes',

        'end_date'   => 'date',
    ];

    {
        return LogOptions::defaults()->logOnly(['name', 'status'])->logOnlyDirty();
    }

    public function framework() { return $this->belongsTo(Framework::class); }

    public function users()
    {
        return $this->belongsToMany(User::class, 'audit_users');
    }

    public function isActive(): bool
    {
        $now = now()->toDateString();
        return $this->status === 'in_progress'
            && $this->start_date <= $now
            && $this->end_date >= $now;
    }
}

            'password'          => 'hashed',
            'is_active'         => 'boolean',
        ];

    {
        return LogOptions::defaults()
            ->logOnly(['first_name', 'last_name', 'email', 'is_active'])

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\User;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;
use Spatie\Permission\Models\Role;

class UserController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $users = User::with('roles')->latest()->paginate(25);
        return view('users.index', compact('users'));
    }

    public function create()
    {
        $roles = Role::all();
        return view('users.create', compact('roles'));
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'first_name' => 'required|string|max:255',
            'last_name'  => 'required|string|max:255',
            'email'      => 'required|email|unique:users',
            'password'   => 'required|min:8|confirmed',
            'role'       => 'required|exists:roles,name',
        ]);

        $user = User::create([
            'first_name' => $data['first_name'],
            'last_name'  => $data['last_name'],
            'email'      => $data['email'],
            'password'   => Hash::make($data['password']),
            'partner'    => $request->partner,
        ]);

        $user->assignRole($data['role']);

        return redirect()->route('users.index')->with('success', 'User created.');
    }

    public function show(User $user)
    {
        return view('users.show', compact('user'));
    }

    public function edit(User $user)
    {
        $roles = Role::all();
        return view('users.edit', compact('user', 'roles'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, User $user)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'first_name' => 'required|string|max:255',
            'last_name'  => 'required|string|max:255',
            'email'      => 'required|email|unique:users,email,' . $user->id,
            'role'       => 'required|exists:roles,name',
        ]);

        $user->update($request->only('first_name', 'last_name', 'email', 'partner'));
        $user->syncRoles([$data['role']]);

        if ($request->filled('password')) {
            $request->validate(['password' => 'min:8|confirmed']);
            $user->update(['password' => Hash::make($request->password)]);
        }

        return redirect()->route('users.index')->with('success', 'User updated.');
    }

    public function destroy(User $user)
    {
        $user->delete();
        return redirect()->route('users.index')->with('success', 'User deleted.');
    }

    public function toggleActive(User $user)
    {
        $user->update(['is_active' => ! $user->is_active]);
        return back()->with('success', 'User status updated.');
    }

    public function bulkImport(Request $request)
    {
        $request->validate(['csv_file' => 'required|file|mimes:csv,txt|max:2048']);

        $path    = $request->file('csv_file')->getRealPath();
        $handle  = fopen($path, 'r');
        $headers = array_map('trim', fgetcsv($handle));

        $required = ['first_name', 'last_name', 'email', 'role'];
        $missing  = array_diff($required, $headers);

        if ($missing) {
            fclose($handle);
            return back()->with('error', 'CSV missing required columns: ' . implode(', ', $missing));
        }

        $validRoles = Role::pluck('name')->all();
        $imported   = 0;

        DB::beginTransaction();
        try {
            while (($row = fgetcsv($handle)) !== false) {
                $data = array_combine($headers, array_pad($row, count($headers), null));

                $email = trim($data['email'] ?? '');
                if (empty($email) || User::where('email', $email)->exists()) {
                    continue;
                }

                $role = trim($data['role'] ?? '');
                if (! in_array($role, $validRoles)) {
                    continue;
                }

                $user = User::create([
                    'first_name' => trim($data['first_name']),
                    'last_name'  => trim($data['last_name']),
                    'email'      => $email,
                    'password'   => Hash::make(Str::random(16)),
                    'partner'    => trim($data['partner'] ?? ''),
                    'is_active'  => true,
                ]);

                $user->assignRole($role);
                $imported++;
            }
            DB::commit();
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            DB::rollBack();
            fclose($handle);
            return back()->with('error', 'Import failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
        }

        fclose($handle);
        return redirect()->route('users.index')->with('success', "Imported {$imported} user(s). They will need to use 'Forgot Password' to set their password.");
    }
}

<?php
namespace App\Http\Controllers;
use Illuminate\Http\Request; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;

class SettingsController extends Controller {
    public function index() {
        $branding=DB::table('branding')->first();
        $settings=DB::table('settings')->pluck('value','key');
        return view('settings.index',compact('branding','settings'));
    }
    public function update(Request $request) {
        foreach($request->except(['_token','_method']) as $key=>$value) {
            DB::table('settings')->updateOrInsert(['key'=>$key],['value'=>$value,'updated_at'=>now()]);
        }
        return back()->with('success','Settings saved.');
    }
    public function updateBranding(Request $request) {
        $data=$request->validate(['organization_name'=>'required|string|max:255','primary_color'=>'required|string','secondary_color'=>'required|string','accent_color'=>'required|string','timezone'=>'required|string','date_format'=>'required|string','currency'=>'required|string']);
        DB::table('branding')->updateOrInsert([],array_merge($data,['updated_at'=>now()]));
        return back()->with('success','Branding updated.');
    }
    public function uploadLogo(Request $request) {
        $request->validate(['logo'=>'required|image|max:2048']);
        $path=$request->file('logo')->store('logos','public');
        DB::table('branding')->update(['logo_path'=>$path,'updated_at'=>now()]);
        return back()->with('success','Logo updated.');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Customer;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class CustomerController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $customers = Customer::withCount(['users', 'frameworks', 'assessments', 'risks'])
            ->latest()
            ->paginate(25);

        return view('customers.index', compact('customers'));
    }

    public function create()
    {
        return view('customers.create');
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'name'          => 'required|string|max:255',
            'slug'          => 'nullable|string|max:255|unique:customers,slug',
            'contact_name'  => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'contact_email' => 'nullable|email|max:255',
            'contact_phone' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
            'status'        => 'required|in:active,trial,inactive,suspended',
            'plan'          => 'required|in:starter,professional,enterprise',
            'notes'         => 'nullable|string',
        ]);

        if (empty($data['slug'])) {
            $data['slug'] = Str::slug($data['name']);
        }

        $customer = Customer::create($data);

        return redirect()->route('customers.show', $customer)
            ->with('success', "Customer \"{$customer->name}\" created.");
    }

    public function show(Customer $customer)
    {
        $customer->loadCount(['users', 'frameworks', 'assessments', 'risks', 'vendors', 'audits']);
        $recentUsers = $customer->users()->with('roles')->latest()->limit(5)->get();

        return view('customers.show', compact('customer', 'recentUsers'));
    }

    public function edit(Customer $customer)
    {
        return view('customers.edit', compact('customer'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, Customer $customer)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'name'          => 'required|string|max:255',
            'slug'          => 'nullable|string|max:255|unique:customers,slug,' . $customer->id,
            'contact_name'  => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'contact_email' => 'nullable|email|max:255',
            'contact_phone' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
            'status'        => 'required|in:active,trial,inactive,suspended',
            'plan'          => 'required|in:starter,professional,enterprise',
            'notes'         => 'nullable|string',
        ]);

        $customer->update($data);

        return redirect()->route('customers.show', $customer)
            ->with('success', 'Customer updated.');
    }

    public function destroy(Customer $customer)
    {
        $customer->delete();
        return redirect()->route('customers.index')
            ->with('success', "Customer \"{$customer->name}\" deleted.");
    }
}
